case_title: KINRY C. LOUIE VS. KUNAL BHASIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-28-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KINRY C. LOUIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KUNAL BHASIN IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT PROOF OF SERVICE COMPLETED BY PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVED ON 9-21-2022 BY A PROCESS SERVER. PROOF OF SERVICE REQUIRED TO BE FILED WITH THE COURT AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND NOT REQUIRED TO REDO-SERVICE. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $138.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL
COPYING FEES (9 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 3 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $81) SERVED SEP-21-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KINRY C. AS TO DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FULL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KINRY C. AS TO DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KINRY C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $156.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,806.00, $1650.00 PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE TO KINRY & ASSOCIATES. AWARD COVERS HOA AND LATE FEES OWED THROUGH DECEMBER 31, 2022. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF KINRY C. LOUIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATED TO HAVE HIS CASE HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KINRY C. AS TO DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,657.87 FILED BY LOUIE, KINRY C. AS TO DEFENDANT BHASIN, KUNAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
